_info: SLAM coordinates (metres). 'orientation' is required by _plan(). standoff = station_pos + orientation_vector * STANDOFF_DIST (0.30 m).

_orientations.+X Wall: station on +X wall  |  car approaches from -X  |  standoff is at station_x - 0.30
_orientations.-X Wall: station on -X wall  |  car approaches from +X  |  standoff is at station_x + 0.30
_orientations.+Z Wall: station on +Z wall  |  car approaches from -Z  |  standoff is at station_z - 0.30
_orientations.-Z Wall: station on -Z wall  |  car approaches from +Z  |  standoff is at station_z + 0.30
